SyncCollections.SyncSql: SELECT BusinessEntityID as Id, a.FirstName + coalesce(' ' + a.middlename,'')+coalesce(' ' + a.lastname,'')  as Content, a.PersonType FROM person.Person a WHERE a.ModifiedDate >= coalesce((select max(convert(date, LastSyncTime)) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='AW-Person'),'20000101')

SELECT BusinessEntityID as Id, a.Name as Content FROM Sales.Store a WHERE a.ModifiedDate >= coalesce((select max(convert(date, LastSyncTime)) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='AW-Store'),'20000101')

select a.ProductID, a.Name, a.Color, a.ProductNumber From Production.Product a WHERE a.ModifiedDate >= coalesce((select max(convert(date, LastSyncTime)) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='AW-Product'),'20000101')
